sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44274" key="eu)/kollos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔκολλ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κόλλα</etym>) <sense id="n44274.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gluing well, sticky</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰκμάς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.109</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
